name: agentic-organization
//: Root deploy layer only. The website itself lives in site/ (its own package.json); `npm run dev` there for local work. This root wraps `build` + `deploy` so Cloudflare Workers (and one-command local deploys) can build the site and upload site/dist as static assets. See docs/deploy-cloudflare.md.

scripts.build: npm --prefix site install && npm --prefix site run build
